# @platform/profile-configuration

Generic user profile and configuration domain package for preferences, settings, entitlements, and runtime configuration models.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/profile-configuration
Version: 0.1.0
Component: profile-configuration
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: core
Bounded context: profile-configuration
Owner: team-domain
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: stable
Role: platform
Class: stable.platform
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-domain
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own profile and configuration domain models
- Define validation and policy rules for user-scoped and organisation-scoped configuration
- Expose pure TypeScript APIs for profile/configuration reads and updates

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not connect directly to PostgreSQL
- Does not own analytical event storage
- Does not evaluate access-control role policy

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Consumed by workflow, access-control, GraphQL contract, and persistence adapter packages through public exports
- Used to define storage-independent profile/configuration rules

### Forbidden consumers

```text
clickhouse-writes
direct-postgres-client
```

## Operational notes

- Transactional profile/configuration storage is expected to be PostgreSQL-backed through the PostgreSQL adapter package
